author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ Hello @everyone, Just wanted to send a special thank you note to everyone for the discussion, debate, participation, and support on PIP 33. I know this was a controversial one, and it ultimately saw the highest levels of PVP (voting weight) participation amongst all of the PIPs since DAO inception: (⁠📢┃dao-announcements⁠). On behalf of the team and myself, I'm grateful it passed. We will continue working relentlessly towards the dream of a persistent, perpetual, decentralized metaverse. And I'm very excited for the C4 updates we having coming in the days ahead. Genuinely, thank you to everyone who continues supporting us through every challenging moment we've encountered. It means a lot. -Michael
content:
Hello @everyone,  Just wanted to send a special thank you note to everyone for the discussion, debate, participation, and support on PIP 33. I know this was a controversial one, and it ultimately saw the highest levels of PVP (voting weight) participation amongst all of the PIPs since DAO inception: (⁠📢┃dao-announcements⁠). On behalf of the team and myself, I'm grateful it passed. We will continue working relentlessly towards the dream of a persistent, perpetual, decentralized metaverse. And I'm very excited for the C4 updates we having coming in the days ahead.  Genuinely, thank you to everyone who continues supporting us through every challenging moment we've encountered. It means a lot.  -Michael

---
